description: Small fragment from the end of a ketubba in which the groom (ʿEli b. David) undertakes to support the two daughters of his bride (Ḥusn bt. Sʿadān ha-Kohen) until their respective marriages. Dating: ca. 995 CE (unclear basis). Witnessed by Tamīm b. Shemuel ha-Kohen, Avraham b. Moshe, Hillel b. Ṣedaqa, and […] ha-Levi b. Ṣedaqa. (Information from CUDL.)
